final:
module shift_register (
    input rst_clk,
    input reset,
    input serial_in,
    output reg [3:0] shift_reg
);

    always @(posedge rst_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            shift_reg <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            shift_reg <= {shift_reg[2:0], serial_in};
        end
    end
endmodule
